raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing context","name":"Before we get specific, what feels most useful to talk through today?","description":"Lets Elena set the agenda without assuming there is a problem to solve.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Leadership forums shift","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter in leadership forums since the reorg — what's changed there?","description":"Invites her to explain the observable shift in external forums without over-reading it.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team interactions shift","name":"I've noticed you seem a bit less present in team interactions lately — what's the story from your side?","description":"Gives her room to explain the change in day-to-day connection without framing it as a deficit.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope fit","name":"What part of your current scope feels most natural right now?","description":"Surfaces whether the current shape of the role fits or only partially fits.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope strain","name":"What part of your current scope feels heaviest right now?","description":"Finds where the role is creating drag, without assuming the cause.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoffs now","name":"What are you choosing to say yes to most deliberately right now?","description":"Reveals current priorities and what she is intentionally optimizing for after the reorg.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Deprioritised work","name":"What have you intentionally put lower on the list lately?","description":"Surfaces what has been dropped or deferred so the manager can see the real tradeoffs.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Manager support","name":"What would you want more of from me right now?","description":"Makes support concrete and lets her ask for what she needs without having to self-diagnose first.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support shape","name":"What kind of support would actually make the next couple of weeks steadier?","description":"Translates a vague off-feeling into practical support Elena can accept or reject.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step focus","name":"Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete next move without opening a new thread.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
